inventory-organizer.switch.groups_hint: Edit a group to add modded tools — Ranks picks which to equip
inventory-organizer.switch.cat_hint: Assign a group per category — Ranks picks which item you carry
inventory-organizer.switch.missing_tool: §eSwitch: a required tool is missing — add it, or remove that slot in the settings.
inventory-organizer.switch.click_hotbar: Click a hotbar slot for the switch slot
inventory-organizer.switch.click_add: Click a slot to add as storage
inventory-organizer.switch.click_remove: Click a storage slot to remove
inventory-organizer.ost.title: OST permissions
inventory-organizer.ost.subtitle: Default: nobody can sort until you grant it
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.inventory: Organizes your inventory with configurable slot rules, kits, and storage presets.
inventory-organizer.label.no_kits: No kits yet - create one below!
inventory-organizer.hint.select_rule_cli: Select a rule from the list, then click a slot to assign it.
inventory-organizer.hint.tier_not_config: ⚠ Tier Order is not configured – set it up or click Solve!
inventory-organizer.warehouse.map_hint: Click chests to select · Link = connect them · then OST at any linked chest sorts the whole group · scroll to zoom
inventory-organizer.warehouse.help_body:
§eWhat is this?§r A warehouse links several chests into one store.

§b• Click§r chests on the map to select them (gold = selected).
§b• Link§r joins 2+ nearby chests (max 15 blocks) into one group.
§b• OST§r at ANY linked chest then sorts the WHOLE group: every
   item flies to the chest whose profile wants it most.
§b• Unlink§r removes the selected chests from their group.
§b• Share§r toggles whether other players can see the selected
   chest/group on their map (§aprivate by default§r). A §agreen dot§r
   marks a shared chest. Private chests are also protected: only
   the owner can sort them.
§b• Sort§r sorts just the selected chests right now.

§7Scroll to zoom. A double chest counts as one; stacked chests
§7fan out with a §ey<level>§7 badge. Only chests you have opened
§7appear; "Nothing" chests and others' private chests stay hidden.
inventory-organizer.profile.perm_hint: Click to cycle: View / OST / Customize
inventory-organizer.special.wl_confirm_b:
From here on you use the mod at your own risk - we cannot take responsibility for it. The whitelist lets Free-mode behaviour run on servers you add, which some servers may treat as a macro.

Are you sure you want to enable it?
inventory-organizer.guide.welcome.head: Welcome
inventory-organizer.guide.welcome.t1: Everything Inventory Organizer can do. Scroll to read; click Back when done.
inventory-organizer.guide.welcome.d1: Most automatic features only work in 'Free' mode: single player, LAN, Realms, Aternos, or a server you whitelisted. On normal public servers they stay off (safe).
inventory-organizer.guide.slots.head: Slot rules (Inv tab)
inventory-organizer.guide.slots.t1: Left-click a slot after picking a rule from the right panel = assign that rule.
inventory-organizer.guide.slots.t2: Right-click a slot = reset it to 'any'.
inventory-organizer.guide.slots.t3: Double-click a slot = open Tier Order for fine sort priority.
inventory-organizer.guide.slots.d1: 'any' accepts anything · 'empty' is kept empty by the sorter.
inventory-organizer.guide.refill.head: Auto-refill (the green R)
inventory-organizer.guide.refill.t1: Middle-click a HOTBAR slot = mark it for auto-refill (a green R badge appears).
inventory-organizer.guide.refill.t2: In Free mode, when that slot empties it is refilled automatically from the rest of your inventory — pickaxe, block, anything.
inventory-organizer.guide.refill.d1: Refill uses the slot's rule if it has one (e.g. any sword), else the last item there.
inventory-organizer.guide.chestrefill.t1: Open a chest and press 'Rf' (or the Chest refill keybind): every marked hotbar slot is topped up with a matching stack FROM the chest.
inventory-organizer.guide.deposit.head: Deposit all (Dep button)
inventory-organizer.guide.deposit.t1: In a chest, 'Dep' instantly returns every inventory stack whose item is already in the chest. Quick 'put away what belongs here'. (Free mode.)
inventory-organizer.guide.sorting.head: Sorting: OST / OI
inventory-organizer.guide.sorting.t1: OST = sort the open chest. OI = sort your inventory.
inventory-organizer.guide.sorting.t2: Same items merge into full stacks and identical types are grouped together.
inventory-organizer.guide.sorting.d1: The Sort keybind does OST when a chest is open, else OI (configurable in Special).
inventory-organizer.guide.scroll.head: Scroll actions (Free mode)
inventory-organizer.guide.scroll.t1: Plain scroll over a slot = quick-move it (like shift-click): loot, deposit, or move within your inventory.
inventory-organizer.guide.scroll.t2: Shift + scroll in your inventory = OI sort, one item per notch.
inventory-organizer.guide.trash.head: Trash / Void
inventory-organizer.guide.trash.t1: Under Storage, open 'Trash' and place item rules in the grid. In Free mode any matching item is dropped the moment you pick it up.
inventory-organizer.guide.trash.d1: Special Settings → 'Trash mode' switches Drop all / Keep 1 stack (drop only the excess).
inventory-organizer.guide.storage.head: Storage & per-chest profiles
inventory-organizer.guide.storage.t1: Storage = 3 built-in defaults + your saved per-chest profiles ('Profiles…'), plus the Trash editor.
inventory-organizer.guide.storage.t2: Open a chest → 'New profile?' → Yes makes that chest remember its layout.
inventory-organizer.guide.storage.d1: A sign next to a chest names its profile · the 'Pr' button re-binds a carried profile.
inventory-organizer.guide.groups.head: Groups, Tier Order, Kits
inventory-organizer.guide.groups.t1: Groups = fully editable item collections. The built-in groups (Weapons, Blocks, Food…) are real, complete groups built from the game's own data — open any to fine-tune its items.
inventory-organizer.guide.groups.t2: Tier Order = sort priority within a type. Kits = save/load whole slot-config presets.
inventory-organizer.guide.groups.t3: Keybind 'Cycle slot preset' switches between your saved Kits on the fly.
inventory-organizer.guide.special.head: Special Settings
inventory-organizer.guide.special.t1: Keybind mode: Inventory-only / Free / Off. Sort action: Smart / OI / OST / Both.
inventory-organizer.guide.special.t2: Death auto-sort re-sorts after you recover your gear. Whitelist is opt-in (at your risk).
inventory-organizer.guide.switch.head: Auto Tool Switch
inventory-organizer.guide.switch.t1: Enable 'Auto switch' mode in the Inv tab: designate one hotbar slot as the Switch slot and one or more inventory slots as storage. The mod automatically puts the right tool (pickaxe for stone, axe for wood, sword for mobs) into your Switch slot as you look around.
inventory-organizer.guide.switch.t2: Configure tool groups under Ranks -> switch categories. Each category (Pickaxe / Axe / Shovel / Hoe / Mob weapon) can be assigned a group -- Ranks picks the best item in that group. 'On air' sets what happens when you look at empty space: keep, restore the last item, or swap to a specific tool type.
inventory-organizer.guide.switch.t3: Trigger mode (Trigger button in the tab): 'Auto' swaps immediately whenever your crosshair target changes -- single player only. 'Button' mode works everywhere (servers too): press the 'Switch: Trigger Tool Swap' keybind to manually trigger the swap.
inventory-organizer.guide.switch.d1: In Auto mode the attack cooldown ticker counts up in your inventory so the tool is already ready when it reaches your hand.
inventory-organizer.guide.warehouse.head: Warehouse (multi-chest)
inventory-organizer.guide.warehouse.t1: The 'Wh' button / keybind opens a top-down chest map. Link nearby chests, then OST at any of them sorts the WHOLE group.
inventory-organizer.guide.warehouse.d1: On servers, only YOUR linked chests are shared; others can OST them only if you grant it (the 'OST' button on the map). Nobody can link or take from your chests.
inventory-organizer.guide.keybinds.head: Keybinds (Controls → Inventory Organizer)
inventory-organizer.guide.keybinds.t1: Sort · Open Kits · Open Settings · Open Warehouse map · Chest refill · Cycle slot preset.
inventory-organizer.guide.keybinds.d1: All unbound by default — assign the ones you want in the normal Controls menu.
inventory-organizer.hud.title: HUD Layout
inventory-organizer.hud.hint: Toggle elements on the right, then drag them onto the frame.
inventory-organizer.hud.resize: Scroll over an element to resize it.
inventory-organizer.guide.crafting.head: Craft from nearby chests
inventory-organizer.guide.crafting.t1: At a crafting table, the vanilla recipe book shows a recipe in green when nearby chests (ones you've opened) hold the missing ingredients.
inventory-organizer.guide.crafting.t2: Click the recipe and the mod pulls the parts out of those chests and fills the 3x3 grid - ingredients you already carry are used too.
inventory-organizer.guide.crafting.t3: A Materials panel sits beside the GUI, listing every nearby chest and its contents. Type to search, set 'Qty', then click any line to pull that item from that chest into your inventory.
inventory-organizer.guide.crafting.t4: The slot under your inventory is a quick deposit: drop a held stack there to stash it in a nearby chest (auto-sorted). Click it empty-handed to send the whole crafting grid back - each ingredient returns to the chest it came from.
inventory-organizer.guide.crafting.d1: Special -> 'Craft source' picks chests-first (default) or inventory-first. Reach: 60 blocks in single player, 15 on servers.
inventory-organizer.guide.hud.head: On-screen HUD overlays
inventory-organizer.guide.hud.t1: Special -> 'HUD' opens the editor. Turn on the combat indicator, a 27-slot mini-inventory, and your worn gear (+offhand, with durability bars).
inventory-organizer.guide.hud.t2: Drag each element anywhere on the preview frame. Drag toward the middle and it snaps to the exact centre line (edge first, then centre).
inventory-organizer.guide.hud.t3: Scroll the mouse wheel over an element to resize it (50%-300%); the size shows on its label.
inventory-organizer.guide.hud.d1: Everything is off by default. The combat indicator only appears during real PvP combat.
inventory-organizer.generic.special: §e[InOr] This container has special slots — InOr can't safely organize it.
inventory-organizer.generic.profile_warn: §e⚠ Modded chest — profile may be buggy
inventory-organizer.guide.groups.d1: In Tier Order each group is a foldable section (▶/▼), closed by default — click a header to open it, then drag items to set which wins.
inventory-organizer.guide.groups.d2: Built-in contents: Blocks = full solid blocks only · Tools = mining tools plus usable items (ender pearl, buckets, lead…) · Weapons = swords, axes & ranged · Nether/End = everything from that dimension.
inventory-organizer.warn.fullinv: §e⚠ Sorting works best with a light, tidy inventory. When it's full, some items may not land in their place.
inventory-organizer.guide.fullinv.head: Full inventory
inventory-organizer.guide.fullinv.t1: Sorting handles a full inventory reliably. If an item truly has no free slot, you'll get a message naming it — free a slot, or set a Trash rule to auto-clear overflow.
inventory-organizer.sort.retry_failed: §eSorting hit a snag — try moving a few items, then sort again.
inventory-organizer.sort.no_room: §eNo room for %s — free up a slot, or set a trash rule to auto-clear.
inventory-organizer.qhelp.storage.head: §b§lStorage — quick help
inventory-organizer.qhelp.storage.l3: §f§cTrash§f = items auto-dropped in Free mode (rules grid).
inventory-organizer.qhelp.storage.l4: §7Open a chest in-game → ‘New profile?’ to save its layout.
inventory-organizer.qhelp.storage.l5: §7At a crafting table the recipe book turns recipes §agreen§7 when nearby chests hold the parts — click to auto-fill from them.
inventory-organizer.qhelp.inv.head: §b§lInventory — quick help
inventory-organizer.qhelp.inv.l1: §fPick a rule on the right, then click a slot to assign it.
inventory-organizer.qhelp.inv.l5: §7Special → §eHUD§7 = drag-and-drop on-screen overlays (combat / mini-inventory / gear). Scroll to resize; drag to centre to snap.
inventory-organizer.refill.free_only: §eAuto-refill only works in Free mode (SP / whitelist)
inventory-organizer.preset.none: §7[InOr] No saved presets — create one in Kits
